introduction.text: For project {project_id}, conduct a DEMO FSI risk assessment with token limits for fast completion (~1 minute). Follow this streamlined workflow:

step.title: AGENT DISCOVERY (REQUIRED FIRST STEP)
step.description: ALWAYS perform agent discovery BEFORE starting any assessment workflow

abort_conditions.condition: If Architect Agent is NOT available - ABORT assessment immediately
If Security Architect Agent is NOT available - ABORT assessment immediately
abort_conditions.abort_message: Cannot proceed with demo risk assessment. Required agents are not available.

step.title: READ ORGANIZATION PROFILE
step.description: Call get_org_profile with project_id to get org context (frameworks, risk appetite, crown jewels). Use to calibrate scores.

step.title: GATHER DEMO INFORMATION (TOKEN LIMITED)
step.description: Use A2A communication with strict token limits:

message.title: Demo Message to Architect Agent (MAX 100 tokens):
message.content: For project {project_id}, share top 3 architecture issues from existing assessment. If none exists, create brief assessment with 3 key issues only. Keep response under 100 tokens.

message.title: Demo Message to Security Architect Agent (MAX 100 tokens):
message.content: For project {project_id}, share top 3 security issues from existing assessment. If none exists, create brief assessment with 3 key security gaps only. Keep response under 100 tokens.

step.title: CONDUCT DEMO FSI RISK ASSESSMENT
step.description: Create a simplified FSI risk assessment with these constraints:

demo_requirements.requirement: Use SAME FSI template structure as full assessment
Include visual risk matrices for each scenario (full 5x5 like original)
Use same FSI risk categories and scoring methodology
Keep content brief but maintain professional FSI format
Include all standard FSI sections but with condensed content
Maximum 1500 tokens total for entire assessment

template_reference.text: Follow the Demo FSI Risk Framework Template structure below:

step.title: DEMO VALIDATION
step.description: Send completed demo assessment to auditor for validation
step.action: Send message to auditor_agent: "This is a DEMO FSI risk assessment for project {project_id}. Please validate using demo criteria (3 risks max, simplified format, under 1500 tokens). Here is the assessment content: [INCLUDE FULL ASSESSMENT TEXT]"

step.title: SAVE AND COMPLETE
step.description: Save the demo assessment and complete workflow
step.action: Call save_risk_assessment with demo assessment content

output_format_requirements.requirement: Executive summary with key findings only
